background: Ninety and 95 percent confidence intervals for the alcohol and esophageal cancer illustrative case-control data are calculated.

task.query: Calculate the natural logarithm of the estimated odds ratio (OR).
Calculate the standard error of the natural logarithm of the estimated odds ratio (OR).
Calculate the 90% confidence interval for the odds ratio (OR).
Calculate the 95% confidence interval for the odds ratio (OR).

meta info.caption: Confidence interval for the odds ratio (Alcohol and  esophageal cancer).
